title: TickShield
description: Prevents lag spikes and TPS drops by stabilizing heavy workloads without changing vanilla behavior.
body: ### TickShield TickShield is a lightweight performance mod focused on stabilizing Minecraft under heavy load. Instead of changing game mechanics or simplifying behavior, TickShield controls how work is processed per tick to prevent sudden lag spikes and TPS drops. --- ### What it does TickShield monitors server tick load in real time and keeps it within a safe range. When the game is about to overload a tick, TickShield safely delays non-critical work across multiple ticks while preserving vanilla outcomes. This results in smoother gameplay, fewer freezes, and more consistent performance. --- ### Key features - Prevents lag spikes from TNT chains, mob farms, and redstone systems - Stabilizes TPS under heavy load - Distributes workload across ticks instead of overloading a single tick - Preserves vanilla mechanics and behavior - Works in singleplayer, LAN, and dedicated servers - No configuration required --- ### Design philosophy TickShield does not change what happens in the game. It only changes when work is processed to keep performance stable. > Optimize the workload, not the outcome. --- ### Compatibility TickShield is designed to work alongside major optimization mods such as Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight. It does not replace them and focuses on a different layer of performance: tick stability. --- ### Notes - Server-side mod (also applies to singleplayer worlds) - No gameplay changes - No intrusive UI or settings required
